subcodes.first_line: O ye blessed leaves of the Tree of the All-Merciful! How blessed are ye to have sprung forth from the Divine Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقات المبارکات من الشجره الرحمانیه یا طوبی لکن بما نبتن من السدره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
